extraction.one_line_summary: KRISTOFF Alexander won the sprint with 1300m straight tailwind finish, holding off COQUARD Bryan and BOUHANNI Nacer.
tactical_patterns: KRISTOFF Alexander's team allowed 1300m straight tailwind finish to develop, perfectly suited to his power sprint characteristics.
Direct Energy isolated BOUHANNI Nacer's sprint by committing early, revealing resource allocation error on flat tailwind finishes.
PLANCKAERT Baptiste (Sport Vlaanderen) contested intermediate sprints from breakaway, indicating bonus seconds prioritization over GC protection.

rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: positive: Won sprint with position to spare in tailwind conditions, gained 4-second GC advantage suggesting bonus hunting strategy.
rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: positive: Strong second place finish indicates good form and sprint positioning in technical tailwind approach.
rider_signals.BOUHANNI Nacer: neutral: Third place despite full Direct Energy commitment suggests team leadout depleted him before optimal launch point.
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: Dropped with 5km remaining on flat finish reveals surprising weakness or poor positioning in sprint preparation.
rider_signals.SCHÄR Michael: neutral: Survived in three-rider break until closing kilometers, showing breakaway commitment despite known sprint finish.
